description: Phase 8 propose_from_gaps must emit a valid n6_auto_proposals.json with triggers_fired and created+skipped arrays.
actual_cmd: bash -c '[ -f reports/n6_auto_proposals.json ] && [ "$(jq -r ".schema" reports/n6_auto_proposals.json 2>/dev/null)" = "canon/n6_auto_proposals/1" ] && jq -e ".triggers_fired and (.created|type==\"array\") and (.skipped|type==\"array\")" reports/n6_auto_proposals.json >/dev/null && echo 1 || echo 0'
